vocab.meaning: tận hưởng/đắm mình trong (không khí, ánh nắng)
vocab.example: Many city dwellers visit parks to soak up the sun and enjoy the natural scenery after a long day indoors.

vocab.meaning: ngừng suy nghĩ về công việc/áp lực để thư giãn
vocab.example: A stroll among the trees helps people switch off from the constant notifications and demands of modern life.

vocab.meaning: xả cơn giận/giải tỏa căng thẳng
vocab.example: Parks are the perfect place for people to blow off steam through a brisk walk or an intense jog.
Walking in larger parks allows you to stumble upon hidden gardens or quiet benches you never knew existed.

vocab.meaning: thoát khỏi/rời xa (thói quen, nơi chốn)
vocab.example: It is essential to break away from the concrete jungle once in a while to reconnect with nature in a public park.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn dần dần sau một hoạt động căng thẳng
vocab.example: After a hectic week at the office, I find that a slow walk in the park helps me wind down effectively.

vocab.meaning: ngưỡng mộ/kinh ngạc trước cái gì
vocab.example: People often pause during their walks to marvel at the changing colors of the leaves during autumn.

vocab.meaning: dọn sạch/giải tỏa (thường dùng cho tâm trí)
vocab.example: Fresh air and physical movement help to clear out the mental cobwebs and improve one's focus.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp/duy trì liên lạc (với bạn bè khi đi bộ)
vocab.example: Walking in the park is a fantastic way to keep up with friends while getting some light exercise at the same time.

vocab.meaning: chặn/loại bỏ (tiếng ồn, suy nghĩ tiêu cực)
vocab.example: The dense foliage in many urban parks helps to block out the deafening roar of city traffic.
